title: SPY - 04/15
html:
TRADE ID: 202604151025
SPY - 04/15
Creating Balance At All Time Highs

The markets are green today, though the gains are primarily concentrated in the top seven mega-cap stocks. Excluding these leaders, the broader market is flat to slightly lower. While the S&P 500 is trading at all-time highs, the rally will need to broaden out across other sectors to confirm short-term stability. Meanwhile, the VIX is holding steady at 18.

Today would be a good day to create some balance in a portfolio of stocks. I am sharing an idea that works for almost everyone who is NOT SHORT the market already. This is not insurance like the VIX calls would be, it is merely to balance the delta.

Trade Alert: SPY (Bearish / Neutral) Note: Skip these setups if you are already short SPY.

+ Setup: Sell the July 17 750/755 credit call spread for a .75. Stock needs to stay below 750 at expiration. Note: This is to create balance in a bullish folio

Nic
